name: Phase 2 smoke condition A (scope-aware ReAct) on FrontierScience-Olympiad
short_description: Per-row predictions from the scope-aware ReAct agent (condition A) on FrontierScience-Olympiad rows of the v2 hierarchical-annotation dataset, paired with conditions B and C.
model_description: claude-haiku-4-5 (Anthropic) accessed via the local Claude Code CLI with a minimal system prompt. Agent library: scope_aware_react_v1 (t0006). Tool registry: minimal calculator + finish only. Granularity tag injected per phase per the v2 hierarchy from t0009.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: condition (string), task_id (string), problem (string), gold_answer (string), final_answer (string|null), is_correct (boolean), decision_count (int), final_confidence (float|null), trajectory (string of JSON-serialized list of turn records), agent_refused (boolean).

files.description: Per-row predictions for condition A on the 40 FrontierScience-Olympiad hierarchy-complete rows of hierarchical-annotation-v2.
